mapper.select:
/* TC_ECS_CD_Dao_retrieveCmmnCd */ SELECT A.CLS_CD, A.CLS_CD_NM, B.CMMN_CD, B.CMMN_CD_NM, B.CMMN_CD_DC, B.UPPER_CLS_CD, B.UPPER_CMMN_CD, B.USE_YN, B.SORT_ORDR, B.SAP_LNK_YN, B.USR_DFN_VU1, B.USR_DFN_VU2, B.USR_DFN_VU3, B.USR_DFN_VU4, B.USR_DFN_VU5, B.USR_DFN_VU6, B.USR_DFN_VU7, B.USR_DFN_VU8 FROM tc_ecs_cls_cd A, tc_ecs_cd B WHERE A.CLS_CD = B.CLS_CD
AND A.USE_YN = #{useYn} AND B.USE_YN = #{useYn}
AND A.CLS_CD = #{clsCd}
AND B.CMMN_CD = #{cmmnCd}
AND B.CMMN_CD_NM LIKE '%' || #{cmmnCdNm} || '%'
AND B.USR_DFN_VU1 LIKE '%' || #{usrDfnEtcVu} || '%'
AND B.USR_DFN_VU2 LIKE '%' || #{usrDfnEtcVu} || '%'
AND B.USR_DFN_VU3 LIKE '%' || #{usrDfnEtcVu} || '%'
AND B.USR_DFN_VU4 LIKE '%' || #{usrDfnEtcVu} || '%'
AND B.USR_DFN_VU5 LIKE '%' || #{usrDfnEtcVu} || '%'
AND B.USR_DFN_VU6 LIKE '%' || #{usrDfnEtcVu} || '%'
AND B.USR_DFN_VU7 LIKE '%' || #{usrDfnEtcVu} || '%'
AND B.USR_DFN_VU8 LIKE '%' || #{usrDfnEtcVu} || '%'
ORDER BY A.CLS_CD, B.SORT_ORDR, B.CMMN_CD
mapper.sql: SELECT B.CLS_CD, B.CMMN_CD, B.CMMN_CD_NM, B.CMMN_CD_DC, B.UPPER_CLS_CD, B.UPPER_CMMN_CD, B.USE_YN, B.SORT_ORDR, B.SAP_LNK_YN, B.USR_DFN_VU1, B.USR_DFN_VU2, B.USR_DFN_VU3, B.USR_DFN_VU4, B.USR_DFN_VU5, B.USR_DFN_VU6, B.USR_DFN_VU7, B.USR_DFN_VU8
WHERE A.CLS_CD = B.CLS_CD AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.CLS_CD IN #{item}
mapper.select:
/* TC_ECS_CD_Dao_retrieveClsCdCmmnCd */
FROM tc_ecs_cls_cd A, tc_ecs_cd B
UNION
FROM tc_adt_cls_cd A, tc_adt_cd B
UNION
FROM tc_cms_cls_cd A, tc_cms_cd B
UNION
FROM tc_fms_cls_cd A, tc_fms_cd B
UNION
FROM tc_hrm_cls_cd A, tc_hrm_cd B
UNION
FROM tc_law_cls_cd A, tc_law_cd B
UNION
FROM tc_lws_cls_cd A, tc_lws_cd B
UNION
FROM tc_mgt_cls_cd A, tc_mgt_cd B
UNION
FROM tc_stg_cls_cd A, tc_stg_cd B
UNION
FROM tc_wcb_cls_cd A, tc_wcb_cd B
UNION
FROM tc_wfm_cls_cd A, tc_wfm_cd B
UNION
FROM tc_wqe_cls_cd A, tc_wqe_cd B
UNION
FROM tc_wri_cls_cd A, tc_wri_cd B
UNION
FROM tc_wro_cls_cd A, tc_wro_cd B
UNION
FROM tc_ecs_cls_cd A, tc_ecs_cd B
ORDER BY CLS_CD, SORT_ORDR
mapper.insert: /* TC_ECS_CD_Dao_insertCmmnCdList */ INSERT INTO tc_ecs_cd ( CLS_CD, CMMN_CD, CMMN_CD_NM, CMMN_CD_DC, UPPER_CLS_CD, UPPER_CMMN_CD, USE_YN, SORT_ORDR, SAP_LNK_YN, USR_DFN_VU1, USR_DFN_VU2, USR_DFN_VU3, USR_DFN_VU4, USR_DFN_VU5, USR_DFN_VU6, USR_DFN_VU7, USR_DFN_VU8, FRST_REGIST_DT, FRST_RGSTR_ID, LAST_UPDT_DT, LAST_UPDUSR_ID ) VALUES ( #{clsCd}, #{cmmnCd}, #{cmmnCdNm}, #{cmmnCdDc}, #{upperClsCd}, #{upperCmmnCd}, #{useYn}, #{sortOrdr}, #{sapLnkYn}, #{usrDfnVu1}, #{usrDfnVu2}, #{usrDfnVu3}, #{usrDfnVu4}, #{usrDfnVu5}, #{usrDfnVu6}, #{usrDfnVu7}, #{usrDfnVu8}, SYSDATE , #{frstRgstrId}, SYSDATE, #{lastUpdusrId} )
mapper.update: /* TC_ECS_CD_Dao_updateCmmnCdList */ UPDATE tc_ecs_cd SET CMMN_CD_NM = #{cmmnCdNm}, CMMN_CD_DC = #{cmmnCdDc}, UPPER_CLS_CD = #{upperClsCd}, UPPER_CMMN_CD = #{upperCmmnCd}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, SORT_ORDR = #{sortOrdr}, SAP_LNK_YN = #{sapLnkYn}, USR_DFN_VU1 = #{usrDfnVu1}, USR_DFN_VU2 = #{usrDfnVu2}, USR_DFN_VU3 = #{usrDfnVu3}, USR_DFN_VU4 = #{usrDfnVu4}, USR_DFN_VU5 = #{usrDfnVu5}, USR_DFN_VU6 = #{usrDfnVu6}, USR_DFN_VU7 = #{usrDfnVu7}, USR_DFN_VU8 = #{usrDfnVu8}, LAST_UPDT_DT = SYSDATE, LAST_UPDUSR_ID = #{lastUpdusrId} WHERE CLS_CD = #{clsCd} AND CMMN_CD = #{cmmnCd}
mapper.select: /* TC_ECS_CD_Dao_selectDataEnc */ SELECT FN_ECS_DATA_ENCRYPT(#{dataDec}) AS DATA_ENC FROM DUAL

SELECT B.CLS_CD, B.CMMN_CD, B.CMMN_CD_NM, B.CMMN_CD_DC, B.UPPER_CLS_CD, B.UPPER_CMMN_CD, B.USE_YN, B.SORT_ORDR, B.SAP_LNK_YN, B.USR_DFN_VU1, B.USR_DFN_VU2, B.USR_DFN_VU3, B.USR_DFN_VU4, B.USR_DFN_VU5, B.USR_DFN_VU6, B.USR_DFN_VU7, B.USR_DFN_VU8
FROM tc_ecs_cls_cd A, tc_ecs_cd B
FROM tc_ecs_cls_cd A, tc_ecs_cd B
FROM tc_fms_cls_cd A, tc_fms_cd B
FROM tc_cms_cls_cd A, tc_cms_cd B
FROM tc_lws_cls_cd A, tc_lws_cd B
FROM tc_wfm_cls_cd A, tc_wfm_cd B
FROM tc_adt_cls_cd A, tc_adt_cd B
FROM tc_hrm_cls_cd A, tc_hrm_cd B
FROM tc_law_cls_cd A, tc_law_cd B
FROM tc_mgt_cls_cd A, tc_mgt_cd B
FROM tc_stg_cls_cd A, tc_stg_cd B
FROM tc_wcb_cls_cd A, tc_wcb_cd B
FROM tc_wqe_cls_cd A, tc_wqe_cd B
FROM tc_wri_cls_cd A, tc_wri_cd B
FROM tc_wro_cls_cd A, tc_wro_cd B
FROM tc_ecs_cls_cd A, tc_ecs_cd B
WHERE A.CLS_CD = B.CLS_CD AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.CLS_CD = #{clsCd}
